## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One sentence is enough. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / config
- [ ] Rule change (enable / disable / adjust)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore (deps, tooling)

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [conventional commit](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] README updated if a new config or export was added
- [ ] New or modified rules have an inline comment explaining the reasoning
